data.title: Erebor Aims to Fill Financial Gap with Stablecoin Focus
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the collapse of Silicon Valley Bank in 2023 sent shockwaves through the global financial sector, particularly affecting the technology and cryptocurrency industries. In response, a new 'crypto bank' named Erebor, backed by U.S. President Donald Trump's allies and Silicon Valley leaders such as Joe Lonsdale, Palmer Luckey, and Peter Thiel, is set to address this market void.

Erebor's primary strategy is to center its operations around stablecoins, aiming to become the most regulated entity for stablecoin transactions and facilitation. The bank intends to cater to emerging tech companies, especially those in the cryptocurrency, artificial intelligence, and blockchain sectors, filling the financial service gap left by the closure of Silicon Valley Bank.

Erebor's objectives extend beyond offering tailored financial services; it also seeks to bridge the gap between digital and traditional dollars, promoting the widespread adoption and regulatory compliance of stablecoins. For BiyaPay users, the establishment of Erebor is expected to have a significant impact on the cryptocurrency industry. BiyaPay is a platform that facilitates quick exchanges between USDT and over 30 fiat currencies, including the dollar and euro, enabling users to conduct remittances and transactions with ease.

As Erebor rises, stablecoin trading is poised to become a central element of the next wave of financial innovation. BiyaPay will continue to provide convenient and secure digital asset trading services, supporting global users in navigating this transformation.

data.title: Stablecoin Regulatory Challenges Persist in EU and Switzerland
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, Peter Märkl, general counsel at Swiss crypto exchange Bitcoin Suisse, has expressed concerns over the lack of clarity in stablecoin regulatory frameworks within the European Union and Switzerland. Speaking at the German Blockchain Week, Märkl emphasized the need for further development in the classification and rules governing stablecoins under the EU's Markets in Crypto-Assets Regulation (MiCA) framework. While MiCA offers a comprehensive and harmonized regulatory framework for stablecoin issuance, offering, and custody, Märkl noted that the dynamic nature of crypto-assets and their evolving use cases can lead to shifts in classification over time. This situation places foreign stablecoin issuers at a disadvantage, as they must consider obtaining a license under MiCA due to strict enforcement of rules, particularly in Germany.

Märkl also highlighted challenges within Switzerland's regulatory environment, describing it as unfriendly to issuers. Swiss regulations impose the Know Your Customer (KYC) burden on stablecoin issuers, requiring them to identify individual holders, which Märkl views as unreasonable. Despite the introduction of Switzerland's DLT Act four years ago, Märkl pointed out existing gaps in the local regulatory framework, stressing the importance of focusing on stablecoin regulation and establishing rules that are favorable to industry players. He acknowledged ongoing legislative processes but emphasized the need for careful assessment of their outcomes.

Bitcoin Suisse is actively pursuing its ambitions within the EU, leveraging its five-year-old Liechtenstein Crypto-Asset Service Provider registration to seek a full MiCA license. Märkl explained that Bitcoin Suisse has operated a subsidiary in Liechtenstein for five years, registered under the TV2 law as a CASP, making it a natural choice to extend this registration to a MiCA license. Beyond Europe, Bitcoin Suisse is exploring international expansion opportunities, having received in-principle approval from the Abu Dhabi Global Market (ADGM) in May. Märkl noted that the firm's CEO, Andrej Majcen, relocated to Abu Dhabi one and a half years ago, highlighting the region's significant attraction for the company. Additionally, Bitcoin Suisse is considering opportunities in the United Kingdom and the United States, with final decisions contingent on regulatory developments in these regions.

data.title: Altcoin Season Index Shows Recovery in Cryptocurrency Market
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, data from Coinmarketcap reveals that the Altcoin Season Index currently stands at 25, marking an increase from its previous low of 15 on June 22. This index indicates that over the past 90 days, approximately 25 out of the top 100 cryptocurrencies by market capitalization have outperformed Bitcoin.

The Altcoin Season Index is a real-time metric used to assess whether the cryptocurrency market is experiencing a period dominated by altcoins. It is based on the performance of the top 100 altcoins relative to Bitcoin over the last 90 days.

data.title: Blue Star Capital Secures Funding for Initial Bitcoin Purchase
data.description: According to BlockBeats, UK-listed company Blue Star Capital has raised £1.25 million (approximately $1.71 million). The funds will be used for the company's first Bitcoin acquisition, facilitated indirectly through SatoshiPay.

data.title: Capo Of Crypto Predicts Bitcoin Price Crash Below $100,000, Doom Call For Altcoins
data.description:
Crypto analyst Capo of Crypto, who is currently one of the most recognizeable names in crypto spaces on social media, has sounded a warning for the market. The analyst has completely dismissed the current trajectory of the Bitcoin price and, by extension, the altcoin market, calling for only a short-lived rally. His analysis points to a Bitcoin price crash, but the most impact is expected to be felt by the altcoin market as they tumble further. Bitcoin Price Is Headed Below $100,000 In the post on the social media platform X (formerly Twitter), Capo of Crypto shares a rather bearish thesis that suggests that the current strength in Bitcoin won’t last
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/bitcoin/capo-of-crypto-bitcoin-crash/

data.title: A Swiss crypto focused bank, starts trading with Ripple’s RLUSD
data.description:
AMINA Bank becomes the first globally operating Swiss bank to offer trading and custody services for Ripple's RLUSD stablecoin.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/swiss-bank-starts-trading-with-ripples-rlusd/

data.title: OKX Wallet is listed on Cryptopedia's 37th Aptos special event
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, OKX Wallet has launched the 37th Aptos special event on Cryptopedia. The event time is from 18:00 on July 3, 2025 to 18:00 on August 26, 2025 (UTC+8). During this period, users can complete and verify Aptos' interactive tasks through Cryptopedia, and have the opportunity to share token rewards worth 217,000 USDT. Users can participate in the event through the following link: https://web3.okx.com/ul/oq77ZS
It is reported that Aptos is a high-performance Layer 1 blockchain built on the Move language, which helps secure and scalable Web3 applications. OKX Wallet is the industry's leading one-stop Web3 portal, which has supported 130+ popular public chains.

data.title: A newly created wallet received $12.1 million worth of SAHARA from Binance
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a newly created wallet received 150 million SAHARA (worth US$12.1 million) from Binance.

data.title: Market Optimism Surrounds Ethereum and Bitcoin Amid Economic Indicators
data.description: According to BlockBeats, analyst Adam from Greeks.Live noted a prevailing bullish sentiment within the community regarding market direction, particularly showing strong confidence in Ethereum's potential rise. Traders are closely monitoring the $110,000 level as a critical price point for Bitcoin, while also paying attention to tonight's non-farm payroll data and the opening of the U.S. stock market for potential impacts on the market.

data.title: The application functions related to the RealMint platform have been deployed and debugged and will be officially available in the near future
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: RealMint is an innovative platform focused on the digitization of real-world assets (RWA). It is committed to using blockchain technology to standardize the rights confirmation, structured splitting and compliant transactions of traditional financial assets (including but not limited to real estate, bonds, accounts receivable, artworks and commodities, etc.), build a bridge between real assets and the crypto ecosystem, and enhance the liquidity, transparency and global allocation efficiency of traditional assets.

data.title: South Korea's KB Kookmin Card files 35 stablecoin-related trademark applications
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: South Korea's KB Kookmin Credit Card Company has submitted 35 trademark applications related to stablecoins, including "KBCSTB", "KBCST", "KBCKRW" and other names. This move is seen as its strategic deployment to seize the Korean won-pegged stablecoin market. KB Kookmin Credit Card has become the second major Korean credit card institution to enter the stablecoin field after Shinhan Credit Card. (MoneyS)

data.title: Agricultural Bank of China Addresses Investor Queries on Stablecoins and Cryptocurrency
data.description: According to Odaily, the Agricultural Bank of China has responded to investor inquiries on its interactive platform regarding capital injection, stock buybacks, and the development of stablecoins. Addressing concerns about the progress of stablecoins and cryptocurrencies, the bank clarified that regulatory authorities are implementing the current round of capital injections for state-owned banks in a structured manner, following a phased and tailored approach for each bank. The Agricultural Bank of China will proceed with related tasks according to unified arrangements. While keeping an eye on global trends in stablecoins and cryptocurrencies, the bank currently has no plans to develop stablecoins.

data.title: XT will soon list REDX (RedX)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News XT Exchange is about to launch REDX (RedX) and open REDX/USDT trading pairs in the Innovation Zone
REDX is a new generation entertainment platform that connects fans, creators and investors through blockchain technology. Platform revenue comes from transaction fees on the REDX platform, including NFT sales, crowdfunding participation and market activities. By facilitating direct investment in entertainment content, REDX enables businesses and investors to use REDX to fund new projects. In return, supporters can obtain exclusive rights or content copyrights. In addition, REDX's facilities attract nearly 300,000 users each year, providing real-world touchpoints for events and merchandise sales, further driving token utility. This combination of digital and physical ecosystems ensures the long-term sustainable development of REDX.
Deposit time: 18:00 on July 4, 2025 (UTC+8)
Transaction time: 18:00 on July 7, 2025 (UTC+8)
Withdrawal time: 18:00 on July 8, 2025 (UTC+8)

data.title: Optimism Collective's Ethereum Holdings and Revenue in 2025
data.description: According to Foresight News, the Optimism Collective currently holds 17,600 ETH, all of which originates from Superchain's revenue. So far in 2025, the collective has generated over 3,300 ETH in revenue.

data.title: Agricultural Bank of China: No plans to develop stablecoins
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Agricultural Bank of China responded to investors' questions about capital injection, stock repurchase and stablecoin development on the interactive platform. In response to the market's concern about the development of stablecoins and cryptocurrencies, ABC clearly stated that the regulatory authorities will implement this round of capital injection by state-owned banks in an orderly manner in accordance with the idea of ​​"comprehensive promotion, phased and batched, and one policy for each bank". Our bank will promote related work in accordance with unified arrangements. For the latest development trends of global stablecoins and cryptocurrencies, our bank will follow up and study them. At present, there is no plan to develop stablecoins. (Jinshi)

data.title: Swiss AMINA Bank Integrates Ripple’s Stablecoin RLUSD – Fastest Growing Stablecoin?
data.description:
AMINA bank will initially offer custody and trading services to clients holding RLUSD, with plans to expand its services in the coming months.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/amina-bank-integrates-ripples-stablecoin-rlusd/

data.title: Metaplanet Founder Leads Acquisition of Thai Company DV8
data.description: According to PANews, Simon Gerovich, the founder of Japanese-listed company Metaplanet, has partnered with Sora Ventures, UTXO Management, and Thailand's Kliff Capital to acquire the Thai-listed company DV8 Public Company Limited through a voluntary tender offer. This acquisition is driven by leading investors and strategists in the Bitcoin sector, involving several well-known institutions and individuals, including UTXO Management, Kliff Capital, Sora Ventures, and Moon Inc.

data.title: Solana’s first staking ETF outpaces XRP and ETH futures in opening day performance
data.description:
Solana’s institutional appeal has surged, with data showing significant growth in both its staking Exchange-Traded Fund (ETF) and Solana CME futures markets. The impressive performance translated into a 5% rise in SOL’s value in the last 24 hours to $155 as of press time, according to CryptoSlate’s data.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/solanas-first-staking-etf-outpaces-xrp-and-eth-futures-in-opening-day-performance/
